questions.question: Describe the benefits of full-disk encryption for data stored in virtual machines in a cloud environment. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: Explain how it protects data in case of VM theft or unauthorized access.

questions.question: What are the security risks associated with using shared images in a cloud environment, and how can they be mitigated? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: Discuss the risks of using shared images and provide examples of how to mitigate them.

questions.question: A cloud user wants to deploy a trusted hypervisor on a virtual machine to ensure the security of the operating system. What are the benefits and limitations of using a trusted hypervisor? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: Discuss the benefits and limitations of using a trusted hypervisor and provide examples.
